description.en-GB: The role whose members will lose money.
description.en-US: The role whose members will lose money.
description.fr: Les membres de whose perdront de l'argent.

description.en-GB: How much money you wanna remove.
description.en-US: How much money you wanna remove.
description.fr: Le montant que vous voulez retirer.
description.ru: Количество денег, которе вы хотите забрать.

description.en-GB: The place from where you wanna remove money(cash or bank). By default - bank.
description.en-US: The place from where you wanna remove money(cash or bank). By default - bank.
description.fr: L'emplacement où vous voulez supprimer l'argent (cash ou bank). Par défaut - bank.
description.ru: Место, откуда вы хотите забрать деньги(cash или bank). По умолчанию - bank.
